- [x] Clarify Project Requirements.
- [x] Scaffold the Project.
- [x] Customize the Project.
- [x] Install Required Extensions.
- [x] Compile the Project.
  Verified with `npm run check`, which runs `typecheck`, `format:check`, and `build` successfully.
- [x] Create and Run Task.
  Added the VS Code task `check` in `.vscode/tasks.json` and validated it successfully.
- [ ] Launch the Project.
  Left pending because launch/debug mode still requires explicit user confirmation.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete.
  README and this file were synchronized with the current validated project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
